---
title: "Stranica nije pronađena"
toc: false
number-sections: false
lang: hr-HR
comments: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    body-classes: vd-page
---

```{=html}
<header class="vd-hub-head">
  <span class="vd-hub-kicker">Greška 404</span>
  <h1 class="vd-hub-title">Ovdje nema ničega</h1>
  <p class="vd-hub-lede">Stranicu koju tražite nismo pronašli. Možda je premještena ili je poveznica zastarjela. Vratite se na početak ili otvorite vizualni vodič kroz knjigu.</p>
</header>

<section class="vd-hub-part vd-dio-3" aria-label="Povratak">
  <div class="vd-hub-grid">
    <a class="vd-hub-card" href="/Javne-politike/index.html">
      <span class="vd-hub-num">§</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-name">Naslovnica</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-q">Početak i sadržaj knjige.</span>
      <span class="vd-go">Otvorite →</span>
    </a>
    <a class="vd-hub-card" href="/Javne-politike/chapters/00-uvod.html">
      <span class="vd-hub-num">00</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-name">Uvod</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-q">Zašto bismo otvorili ovu knjigu?</span>
      <span class="vd-go">Otvorite →</span>
    </a>
    <a class="vd-hub-card" href="/Javne-politike/vodic.html">
      <span class="vd-hub-num">✦</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-name">Vodič</span>
      <span class="vd-hub-q">Knjiga u 20 mentalnih mapa.</span>
      <span class="vd-go">Otvorite →</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```
